title: Moroccan Cod Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with cod, inspired by the spices of Moroccan cuisine. Perfect for a cold day.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the robust spice mix and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cod and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Add the harira, salt, and light spice mix. Stir well.
Bring to a simmer, reduce heat to low, and cook for 10-12 minutes or until the cod is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
